title: Customer Feature Request: Dark Mode Support
description: Multiple enterprise customers have requested dark mode/theme support for their users. They report that many of their team members use the application during evening hours and prefer dark interfaces to reduce eye strain.

business_context.competitor_status: All major competitors have dark mode

user_research.evening_usage: 42% of active users login between 6 PM - 2 AM
user_research.accessibility: Dark mode improves usability for users with light sensitivity
user_research.retention: Users with theme preferences are 15% more likely to be active after 3 months
user_research.mobile_trend: 98% of mobile apps now include dark mode

technical_requirements: Ensure accessibility standards are maintained (WCAG 2.1 AA)
acceptance_criteria: Users can toggle between light and dark themes in settings
System respects OS-level dark mode preference on first login
All UI components properly themed (text, backgrounds, borders, buttons)
Color contrast ratios meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards
Theme preference persists across sessions and devices
